sys_hub_action_type_definition.description: Makes a get request on Steam API with the method GetPlayerSummaries

{"appnews":{"appid":489830,"newsitems":[{"gid":"1789039014491610","title":"Steam Global Top Sellers for week of 14 Jan — 21 January 2025","url":"https://steamstore-a.akamaihd.net/news/externalpost/SteamDB/1789039014491610","is_external_url":true,"author":"SteamDB","contents":" * DYNASTY WARRIORS: ORIGINS; * Steam Deck; * Assetto Corsa EVO; * Path of Exile 2; * EA SPORTS FC™ 25; * Sid Meier's Civilization VII; * The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim Special Edition; * FINAL FANTASY VII REBIRTH; * Heroes of Hammerwatch II; * Monster Hunter Wilds; * excluding free to play games View...","feedlabel":"SteamDB","date":1737450000,"feedname":"SteamDB","feed_type":0,"appid":489830},{"gid":"1786573931053125","title":"Skyblivion only has one region of the map left to finish: 'We are nearly ready to release an entirely remastered Elder Scrolls game'","url":"https://steamstore-a.akamaihd.net/news/externalpost/PC Gamer/1786573931053125","is_external_url":true,"author":"Jody Macgregor","contents":"The TESRenewal modding group has been working on Skyblivion, a remastered version of Oblivion playable in Skyrim Special Edition, since 2018 \"in earnest\" though the project \"officially started over 11 years ago,\" as the latest progress video explains. Said video also mentions how close to completion...","feedlabel":"PC Gamer","date":1735787151,"feedname":"PC Gamer","feed_type":0,"appid":489830},{"gid":"1785774543641042","title":"Here's a mod that gives Skyrim Special Edition its own Witcher-style bestiary","url":"https://steamstore-a.akamaihd.net/news/externalpost/PC Gamer/1785774543641042","is_external_url":true,"author":"Jody Macgregor","contents":"Some mods fill obvious gaps. Others, you don't know you need until you discover they exist. For instance, I had no idea I needed a mod that gave me a randomized psychedelic experience every time I drank skooma until I learned it existed, and now it's an essential part of every playthrough... Read mo...","feedlabel":"PC Gamer","date":1734320343,"feedname":"PC Gamer","feed_type":0,"appid":489830}],"count":286}}

sys_variable_value.value: {"appnews":{"appid":489830,"newsitems":[{"gid":"1789039014491610","title":"Steam Global Top Sellers for week of 14 Jan — 21 January 2025","url":"https://steamstore-a.akamaihd.net/news/externalpost/SteamDB/1789039014491610","is_external_url":true,"author":"SteamDB","contents":" * DYNASTY WARRIORS: ORIGINS; * Steam Deck; * Assetto Corsa EVO; * Path of Exile 2; * EA SPORTS FC™ 25; * Sid Meier's Civilization VII; * The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim Special Edition; * FINAL FANTASY VII REBIRTH; * Heroes of Hammerwatch II; * Monster Hunter Wilds; * excluding free to play games View...","feedlabel":"SteamDB","date":1737450000,"feedname":"SteamDB","feed_type":0,"appid":489830},{"gid":"1786573931053125","title":"Skyblivion only has one region of the map left to finish: 'We are nearly ready to release an entirely remastered Elder Scrolls game'","url":"https://steamstore-a.akamaihd.net/news/externalpost/PC Gamer/1786573931053125","is_external_url":true,"author":"Jody Macgregor","contents":"The TESRenewal modding group has been working on Skyblivion, a remastered version of Oblivion playable in Skyrim Special Edition, since 2018 \"in earnest\" though the project \"officially started over 11 years ago,\" as the latest progress video explains. Said video also mentions how close to completion...","feedlabel":"PC Gamer","date":1735787151,"feedname":"PC Gamer","feed_type":0,"appid":489830},{"gid":"1785774543641042","title":"Here's a mod that gives Skyrim Special Edition its own Witcher-style bestiary","url":"https://steamstore-a.akamaihd.net/news/externalpost/PC Gamer/1785774543641042","is_external_url":true,"author":"Jody Macgregor","contents":"Some mods fill obvious gaps. Others, you don't know you need until you discover they exist. For instance, I had no idea I needed a mod that gave me a randomized psychedelic experience every time I drank skooma until I learned it existed, and now it's an essential part of every playthrough... Read mo...","feedlabel":"PC Gamer","date":1734320343,"feedname":"PC Gamer","feed_type":0,"appid":489830}],"count":286}}
